 --------------080705030505060704070401
 Content-Type: text/plain;
  name="frost diff.txt"
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
 Content-Disposition: inline;
  filename="frost diff.txt"
 
 diff -ruN frost.orig/Makefile frost/Makefile
 --- frost.orig/Makefile	2008-04-02 13:35:08.000000000 -0400
 +++ frost/Makefile	2008-04-02 13:35:40.000000000 -0400
 @@ -6,12 +6,12 @@
  #
  
  PORTNAME=	frost
 -PORTVERSION=	1.2.0.20071211
 +PORTVERSION=	1.2.0.20080304
  PORTEPOCH=	2
  CATEGORIES=	net-p2p java
  MASTER_SITES=	SF
  MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	jtcfrost
 -DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-11-Dec-2007
 +DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-04-Mar-2008
  
  MAINTAINER=	peter.thoenen@yahoo.com
  COMMENT=	Frost is a Freenet client that provides messenger and file services
 diff -ruN frost.orig/distinfo frost/distinfo
 --- frost.orig/distinfo	2008-04-02 13:35:08.000000000 -0400
 +++ frost/distinfo	2008-04-02 13:39:37.000000000 -0400
 @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 -MD5 (frost-11-Dec-2007.zip) = 129604231233cc34775d6a9b95316c4f
 -SHA256 (frost-11-Dec-2007.zip) = 5c7d054a3572625b543aba836d8f7d6577c47f93cf366bc3979b5c327c65021e
 -SIZE (frost-11-Dec-2007.zip) = 5763480
 +MD5 (frost-04-Mar-2008.zip) = 3a7430669cb25ae752e93295482ebb00
 +SHA256 (frost-04-Mar-2008.zip) = 2a8aba23233ee91dfb82719773610e784f601980dbbba790c0bb98b7daa471b0
